meta.purpose: Content briefs for the first controlled SEO production batch. These are briefs only, not final Markdown pages.

batch_policy.next_gate: product_capability_check and fact_check before final Markdown drafting

briefs.meta_title: Industrial IoT Gateway for Modbus, MQTT and Remote Monitoring | IoTEdges
briefs.meta_description: IoTEdges industrial IoT gateways connect Modbus devices, meters, PLCs and field sensors to MQTT, cloud platforms and remote monitoring systems.
briefs.open_graph_title: Industrial IoT Gateway for Remote Monitoring
briefs.open_graph_description: Connect industrial devices to MQTT, cloud dashboards and remote monitoring workflows with IoTEdges gateway solutions.
briefs.positioning: Umbrella product pillar for connecting industrial field devices, meters, PLCs, RTUs and sensors to cloud or supervisory systems through protocols such as Modbus and MQTT.

must_confirm: Supported MQTT versions and authentication methods
Supported Modbus RTU and Modbus TCP modes
Supported physical interfaces such as RS485, RS232 and Ethernet
Available cellular, WiFi or Ethernet connectivity options
Data buffering, local rules or edge processing features
Environmental rating, power supply range and enclosure options
claims_to_avoid_until_confirmed: Guaranteed uptime or fixed cellular coverage

required_sections: Hero: Industrial IoT Gateway for Modbus, MQTT and remote monitoring
What an industrial IoT gateway does
Typical architecture: field devices -> IoTEdges gateway -> MQTT/cloud/SCADA
How to choose the right gateway

section_notes.architecture: Keep architecture generic until actual product model names are confirmed.
section_notes.cta: Ask visitors to share protocol, device count, connectivity method and target platform.

knowledge_links: What Is an Industrial IoT Gateway?
case_links: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
article_links: How to Choose an Industrial IoT Gateway for Remote Monitoring

faq_prompts: What devices can an industrial IoT gateway connect to?

briefs.meta_title: MQTT Gateway for Industrial IoT and Modbus Data Collection | IoTEdges
briefs.meta_description: IoTEdges MQTT gateways collect data from Modbus devices, meters, PLCs and sensors, then publish industrial data to MQTT brokers and cloud platforms.
briefs.open_graph_title: Industrial MQTT Gateway for Modbus and Cloud Monitoring
briefs.open_graph_description: Collect industrial field data and publish it to MQTT brokers, dashboards and cloud monitoring platforms.
briefs.positioning: Core cloud-connectivity product page for collecting industrial device data and publishing it to MQTT-based systems.

claims_to_avoid_until_confirmed: Specific broker compatibility beyond generic MQTT

required_sections: Hero: MQTT Gateway for industrial device data
Connecting Modbus, RS485, meters, PLCs and sensors

section_notes.architecture: Use broker-centered architecture: industrial devices -> gateway -> MQTT broker -> application/dashboard.
section_notes.cta: Ask for device protocol, register map, broker details and target dashboard/cloud platform.

case_links: Factory Energy Meter Data Collection with Modbus to MQTT Gateway
Solar Inverter Monitoring over RS485 and MQTT
article_links: How a Modbus to MQTT Gateway Connects Industrial Devices to the Cloud

faq_prompts: What is an MQTT gateway?
Can an MQTT gateway read Modbus devices?

briefs.meta_title: Modbus to MQTT Gateway for Industrial Data Collection | IoTEdges
briefs.meta_description: Convert Modbus RTU or Modbus TCP device data into MQTT messages for energy monitoring, solar inverter monitoring, factory equipment and cloud dashboards.
briefs.open_graph_title: Modbus to MQTT Gateway for Industrial IoT
briefs.open_graph_description: Bridge Modbus devices, RS485 meters and industrial equipment to MQTT brokers and cloud monitoring systems.
briefs.positioning: High-intent protocol product page for converting Modbus device data into MQTT topics and payloads.
briefs.protocol_or_connectivity: Modbus RTU / Modbus TCP to MQTT
conversion_use_cases: PLC or equipment data to MQTT
Remote Modbus devices over cellular to MQTT
required_sections: Hero: Modbus to MQTT gateway for industrial devices

section_notes.architecture: Show device/register polling -> gateway mapping -> MQTT topic/payload -> broker/dashboard.
section_notes.cta: Ask for Modbus register map, device count, polling interval, target MQTT broker and payload format.

briefs.meta_title: Industrial RTU for Remote Monitoring and SCADA Telemetry | IoTEdges
briefs.meta_description: IoTEdges industrial RTU solutions collect field signals from sensors, meters and equipment for remote monitoring, alarms and SCADA telemetry.
briefs.open_graph_description: Collect analog, digital and Modbus field data from remote sites and send telemetry to monitoring systems.
briefs.positioning: Core RTU product pillar for remote telemetry, field IO, alarms, SCADA connectivity and unmanned site monitoring.

must_confirm: Cellular, Ethernet or other communication options
Alarm reporting and local logic support
claims_to_avoid_until_confirmed: Specific waterproof or hazardous area ratings

required_sections: Hero: Industrial RTU for remote telemetry

section_notes.architecture: Use remote site -> RTU -> cellular/Ethernet -> monitoring platform/SCADA.
section_notes.cta: Ask for signal list, site count, communication method, alarm requirements and target platform.

case_links: Remote Pump Station Monitoring with 4G RTU
article_links: How to Choose an RTU for Pump Station Monitoring

briefs.meta_title: 4G RTU for Remote Monitoring and Cellular Telemetry | IoTEdges
briefs.meta_description: IoTEdges 4G RTU solutions collect field data from remote sites and transmit alarms, sensor readings and equipment status over cellular networks.
briefs.open_graph_description: Connect remote pumps, tanks, pipelines, telecom cabinets and environmental stations through cellular RTU telemetry.
briefs.positioning: Connectivity-specific RTU page for remote sites where wired network access is unavailable or impractical.

section_notes.architecture: Use remote assets -> 4G RTU -> cellular network -> MQTT/cloud/monitoring platform.
section_notes.cta: Ask for country/region, carrier/SIM, signal list, site count and reporting interval.
